name: Mindgard
description: AI/LLM security testing platform (Lancaster Uni spinout).

seo.title: Mindgard — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: Mindgard: AI/LLM security testing platform (Lancaster Uni spinout).

when_to_use: LLM red-teaming for prompt injection vulnerability detection
AI model security testing for OWASP ML Top 10 risks
Jailbreak resistance testing before LLM production deployment
Adversarial robustness testing for ML model pipelines
AI security assessment for enterprise LLM use case review

pros: Targeted specifically at LLM and AI model threats
Automated red teaming for prompt injection and jailbreaks
Academic research backing from Lancaster University
Covers model, data, and pipeline attack surfaces
cons: Young product with limited public case studies
AI security category itself is still maturing
Coverage of proprietary model internals is limited
review.verdict: Promising AI/LLM security testing for forward-looking teams, but the category and product are both early.
review.best_for: Enterprises deploying customer-facing LLM apps and needing dedicated AI red teaming.
review.not_for: Teams only using third-party APIs without custom AI pipelines or model hosting.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
